---
name: Defect Report
about: Report a bug or error found in the system.
title: "[DEFECT]: "
labels: ["defect"]
---

### Context
- **Severity:** [ ] Critical | [ ] High | [ ] Medium | [ ] Low
- **Priority:** [ ] P1 | [ ] P2 | [ ] P3 | [ ] P4
- **Reproducible:** [ ] Every time | [ ] Sometimes | [ ] Rarely

### Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of what the defect is -->

### Steps
<!-- Steps to Reproduce the Defect -->
1. <!-- Step 1 -->
2. <!-- Step 2 -->
3. <!-- Step 3 -->

### Behavior
#### Actual
<!-- What actually happens when the defect occurs -->

#### Expected
<!-- What you expected to happen instead -->

### Supplements
#### Environment
- **OS/Browser:** <!-- e.g., Windows 11, Chrome 120, Endevour OS Titan -->
- **Software Version:** <!-- e.g., v1.4.2 -->
- **Device:** <!-- e.g., Mobile, Laptop, TV, Embedded -->
- **Screen Resolution:** <!-- e.g., 1920x1080, 1024x768 -->
- **Dependencies Version:** <!-- e.g., Python v3.12, NodeJs v24.18.0 -->
- **Requirements Version:** <!-- e.g., Sqlite3 v3.53.2, Matplotlib v3.11.0, React v19.2.0 -->

#### Images
<!-- Paste images or screenshots -->

#### Logs
